initial_candidates.sql:
WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 
            WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 
            ELSE 1 
        END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY ms.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgTotalScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
SELECT 
    ss.StyleID,
    ss.StyleName,
    ss.TotalWeightedScore,
    ABS(ss.TotalWeightedScore - ast.AvgTotalScore) AS ScoreDifference
FROM StyleScores ss, AvgScore ast
ORDER BY ss.StyleName;

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY ms.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgTotalWeightedScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
SELECT 
    ss.StyleID,
    ss.StyleName,
    ss.TotalWeightedScore,
    ABS(ss.TotalWeightedScore - ast.AvgTotalWeightedScore) AS DifferenceFromAvg
FROM StyleScores ss, AvgScore ast;

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY ms.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScoreCalc AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
SELECT 
    ss.StyleName,
    ss.TotalWeightedScore,
    ABS(ss.TotalWeightedScore - asc.AvgScore) AS ScoreDifference
FROM StyleScores ss
CROSS JOIN AvgScoreCalc asc;

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY ms.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgTotalScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
SELECT 
    ss.StyleID,
    ss.StyleName,
    ss.TotalWeightedScore,
    ABS(ss.TotalWeightedScore - avgScore.AvgTotalScore) AS ScoreDifference
FROM StyleScores ss, AvgScore avgScore;

WITH StyleScores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.StyleID,
        ms.StyleName,
        SUM(CASE WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 1 THEN 3 WHEN mp.PreferenceSeq = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) AS TotalWeightedScore
    FROM Musical_Preferences mp
    JOIN Musical_Styles ms ON mp.StyleID = ms.StyleID
    GROUP BY ms.StyleID, ms.StyleName
),
AvgScore AS (
    SELECT AVG(TotalWeightedScore) AS AvgTotalScore
    FROM StyleScores
)
SELECT 
    ss.StyleName,
    ABS(ss.TotalWeightedScore - as1.AvgTotalScore) AS AbsoluteDifference
FROM StyleScores ss, AvgScore as1;
